text: Aaj office mein colleague ko mere accent ka mazak udate suna, par mere paas rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki ghar jaakar bimaar Maa aur bache ki fees ka intezam karna hai. Ek divorced aurat hone ke naate samaj pehle hi ungli uthata hai, isliye main bas apna sar jhuka kar kaam karti rehti hoon kyunki rukk gayi toh sab bikhar jayega. Mujhe thakan toh bohot hai, par 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas chalte rehna hai.

College ke baad internship par accent ka mazaak uda toh bura laga, par main jaanti hoon ki ek single mother ki beti hone ke naate mujhe hi ghar ki 'izzat' aur kharcha sambhalna hai. Main thak chuki hoon restricted mobility aur har waqt ke marriage pressure se, par main break nahi le sakti kyunki mera rukna bacchon ke future ke liye khatra hai. Bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon kyunki endurance hi meri majboori hai.

Logon ke taane aur colleague ka mazaak ek taraf, par bacchon ke schooling ka bojh mujhe sone nahi deta. Divorcee hone ki wajah se 'log kya kahenge' ye darr hamesha rehta hai, isliye main apni insult bhool kar bas deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon. Mere paas apni mental health ke liye waqt nahi hai, bas parivaar ka pet palna hi mera asli dharma hai.

Accent ka mazak sunkar laga ki sab chhod doon, par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aa gaya jinke liye mujhe samaj ki exclusion se ladna hai. Ek aurat hone ke naate mujhe double mehnat karni padti hai taaki koi ye na kahe ki divorced hone ki wajah se main nakamyab hoon. Thak kar choor ho chuki hoon, par 'structural endurance' hi mera sahara hai kyunki mere upar poore khandaan ki zimmedari hai.

Mera accent unke liye joke hai, par mere liye ye meri mehnat ka nishaan hai jo main bacchon ki parvarish ke liye kar rahi hoon. Main exhausted hoon par rona 'kamzori' lagega aur 'mard nahi rota' wale samaj mein ek single mother ko toh aur bhi zyada sakht hona padta hai. Main bas chalti ja rahi hoon kyunki main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ki school mein koi humari financial halat par sawal uthaye.
